description: Shared MCP (Model Context Protocol) server registry for AI coding agents

context7.name: context7
context7.description: Context7 MCP for library documentation lookup
context7.notes: Uses Context7's remote MCP server via HTTP. No authentication required.

github.name: github
github.description: GitHub's official MCP server for repository operations, issues, and PRs
github.notes: Uses GitHub's official remote MCP server via HTTP. Requires GitHub Personal Access Token.

stackoverflow-mcp.name: stackoverflow-mcp
stackoverflow-mcp.description: Stack Overflow MCP for searching questions and answers

web-forager.name: web-forager
web-forager.description: Web Forager MCP for web search and content fetching

mcp-atlassian.name: mcp-atlassian
mcp-atlassian.description: Atlassian MCP for Jira and Confluence integration

figma-mcp.name: figma-mcp
figma-mcp.description: Figma MCP for design file integration

sonarqube-mcp.name: sonarqube-mcp
sonarqube-mcp.description: SonarQube MCP for code quality analysis (Docker-based)

buildkite-mcp.name: buildkite-mcp
buildkite-mcp.description: Buildkite MCP for CI/CD pipeline integration
buildkite-mcp.notes: Uses Buildkite's remote MCP server via HTTP. Authentication handled by Buildkite.

chrome-devtools.name: chrome-devtools
chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools MCP for browser automation and testing

mcp-ocr.name: mcp-ocr
mcp-ocr.description: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) MCP for extracting text from images

github-mcp-docker.name: github-mcp-docker
github-mcp-docker.description: Docker-based GitHub MCP for repository operations (alternative to HTTP)
github-mcp-docker.notes: Docker-based alternative to the HTTP GitHub MCP. Use this if you prefer local Docker execution.

figma-developer-mcp.name: figma-developer-mcp
figma-developer-mcp.description: Figma Developer MCP for design file integration (alternative implementation)
figma-developer-mcp.notes: Alternative Figma MCP implementation. Use this or figma-mcp depending on your needs.

markitdown-mcp.name: markitdown-mcp
markitdown-mcp.description: Microsoft MarkItDown MCP for converting various file formats (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, images, audio, HTML, etc.) to clean Markdown
markitdown-mcp.notes: Converts PDF, PowerPoint, Word, Excel, Images (with OCR), Audio (with transcription), HTML, CSV, JSON, XML, ZIP, YouTube URLs, and EPubs to Markdown. Requires Python 3.10+. Use 'uvx markitdown-mcp' or 'pipx install markitdown-mcp'.

markdownlint-mcp.name: markdownlint-mcp
markdownlint-mcp.description: Markdown linter MCP for validating, fixing, and ensuring compliance of Markdown files with industry standards
markdownlint-mcp.notes: Provides lint_markdown, fix_markdown, and get_configuration tools. Supports all 52 markdownlint rules with 30 auto-fixable rules. Based on CommonMark and GitHub Flavored Markdown standards.

metadata.description: Central registry of MCP servers for Claude Code and OpenCode
